nasb.text: Yet leave the stump with its roots in the ground, But with a band of iron and bronze around it In the new grass of the field; And let him be drenched with the dew of heaven, And let him share with the beasts in the grass of the earth.

esv.text: But leave the stump of its roots in the earth, bound with a band of iron and bronze, amid the tender grass of the field. Let him be wet with the dew of heaven. Let his portion be with the beasts in the grass of the earth.

cnv.text: 然而，樹根的餘幹卻要留在地上， 用鐵和銅的鍊子圍住， 留在野地的青草中， 使他被天露滴濕； 使他像走獸一樣在地上的草叢中得他的分。

ccb.text: 但把树丕留在地里，用铁环和铜环箍住他留在野地的青草中，让他被天上的露水浸湿，与野兽一起吃草。
